name: hplan
description: Evidence + COGS + Decision gate that runs BEFORE you commit to building. Mandatory competitor and interview evidence, executable COGS sentinel (p50/p90 margin with abuse blend), append-only Do-Not-Build exclusions registry, self-eval decision log, and multi-target handoff to Spec-Kit / Kiro / GStack / Claude Code. Use when an idea reaches PRD or implementation pressure before evidence is credible.
